description:
Be prepared for unexpected situations and don’t let them burn a hole in your pocket! Avail a cashless cover while purchasing medicines only with our #BeFitCover. Sounds unbelievable? It’s true! Know more about it here - https://bit.ly/3HLDx2z

#ICICILombard #NibhayeVaade #UnbelievableButTrue
